assertions.title: Reality updates actual field with mutation

steps.observed: ✓ Updated actual for tension 01KJJH7SDKTMJS8NPFK2F1ZR0D. Old: 'initial actual' -> New: 'updated actual value'

steps.expected: New actual value and mutation history visible
steps.observed: Actual field shows 'updated actual value', mutation history shows [actual] mutation with old/new values

commands: werk add 'Test tension for reality' 'initial actual' -> exit 0, created tension
werk reality 01KJJH7SDKTMJS8NPFK2F1ZR0D 'updated actual value' -> exit 0, success message
werk show 01KJJH7SDKTMJS8NPFK2F1ZR0D -> displays mutation: [actual] initial actual -> updated actual value
evidence.filesystem: Tension updated in .werk/sd.db with mutation record

steps.expected: EDITOR opened with current actual pre-filled
steps.observed: Editor opened with 'updated actual value' displayed, then 'No changes made' message when unchanged

commands: EDITOR=cat werk reality 01KJJH7SDKTMJS8NPFK2F1ZR0D -> outputs 'updated actual value', then 'No changes made (editor cancelled or content unchanged)'
evidence.notes: EDITOR=cat successfully displayed the current actual value, confirming it was passed to the editor

steps.action: Resolve the tension with werk resolve <id>
Attempt reality update on resolved tension
steps.expected: Error with non-zero exit code, actual unchanged
steps.observed: error: cannot update field on Resolved tension, Exit code: 2

commands: werk reality 01KJJH7SDKTMJS8NPFK2F1ZR0D 'should fail' -> exit 2, error message
evidence.exitCodes: Resolve: 0, Reality on resolved: 2 (non-zero as expected)

assertions.title: Desire updates desired field with mutation

steps.action: Create new tension for desire test

steps.observed: ✓ Updated desired for tension 01KJJH8D392Z754QRMSDGYR471. Old: 'Test tension for desire' -> New: 'updated desired value'

steps.expected: New desired value and mutation history visible
steps.observed: Desired field shows 'updated desired value', mutation history shows [desired] mutation with old/new values

commands: werk add 'Test tension for desire' 'initial actual' -> exit 0, created tension 01KJJH8D392Z754QRMSDGYR471
werk desire 01KJJH8D392Z754QRMSDGYR471 'updated desired value' -> exit 0, success message
werk show 01KJJH8D392Z754QRMSDGYR471 -> displays mutation: [desired] Test tension for desire -> updated desired value

steps.expected: EDITOR opened with current desired pre-filled
steps.observed: Editor opened with 'updated desired value' displayed, then 'No changes made' message when unchanged

commands: EDITOR=cat werk desire 01KJJH8D392Z754QRMSDGYR471 -> outputs 'updated desired value', then 'No changes made (editor cancelled or content unchanged)'
evidence.notes: EDITOR=cat successfully displayed the current desired value, confirming it was passed to the editor

commands: werk config set agent.command 'echo test' -> exit 0, success message
werk config get agent.command -> exit 0, outputs 'agent.command = echo test'

assertions.title: Config with no workspace creates/uses global config

steps.action: Navigate to directory with no .werk/ and set config

commands: cd /tmp/werk-foundation-flow-update-config-completely-outside && werk config set global.test 'truly global' -> exit 0
evidence.filesystem: Global config at ~/.werk/config.toml created, no local .werk/ in test directory

steps.expected: Clear error mentioning config file path and parse error
steps.observed: error: config error: malformed config file at /private/tmp/.../.werk/config.toml: TOML parse error at line 1, column 9

commands: werk config get agent.command -> exit 1, error: 'config error: malformed config file at ... TOML parse error at line 1, column 9'
evidence.errorMessage: error: config error: malformed config file at /private/tmp/werk-foundation-flow-update-config/.werk/config.toml: TOML parse error at line 1, column 9 | expected `.`, `=`

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All update config flow assertions validated successfully through CLI user surface.
